biography: Gold Aceron is a Filipino actor, brand endorser, model, and YouTuber, born in Tondo, Manila, Philippines.  He won Best Young Actor for the movie "Lando at Bugoy" (2016) at the Urduja Film Festival (2017). He also won Best Actor for the movie "Metamorphosis" (2019) at the Cinema One Originals Film Festival (2019), PARAGON Critics Choice Awards (2020), and Pista ng Pelikulang Pilipino (Filipino Film Festival) (PPP) (2020).
name: Gold Aceron
